title: Cozy Smoky Gooey Fish Fillet Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly Norwegian dish featuring fish fillets braised in a smoky and gooey sauce for a cozy, comforting meal.
instructions: Season fish fillets with salt and pepper. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant, do not burn the garlic.
Stir in red pepper flakes and malt syrup, continue cooking for another 2 minutes to develop flavors.
Gently place fish fillets skin-side down into the pan. Pour soy sauce over them.
Braise fish fillets in the oven at 350°F for about 15-20 minutes or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (fish is done).
Remove from heat and allow to rest for a few minutes before serving. Garnish with chopped parsley and additional pepper flakes if desired.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables as a side dish.
